debug_info.goal:
n k N M : ℕ
h : 0 < n ∧ 0 < k ∧ k ≥ n
inst✝ : NeZero n
heven : Even (k - n)
switch_seq : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → Prop
SN SM : Finset (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool)
h₀ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    switch_seq s ↔
      s 0 = Function.const (Fin (2 * n)) false ∧
        ∀ (t : Fin k), ∃ i, s t.succ = Function.update (s t.castSucc) i !s t.castSucc i
h₁ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    s ∈ SN ↔
      switch_seq s ∧
        ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 n, s (Fin.last k) ↑i = true ∧ ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico n (2 * n), s (Fin.last k) ↑i = false
h₂ :
  ∀ (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool),
    s ∈ SM ↔
      switch_seq s ∧
        ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico 0 n, s (Fin.last k) ↑i = true ∧ ∀ i ∈ Finset.Ico n (2 * n), ∀ (t : Fin (k + 1)), s t ↑i = false
h₃ : N = SN.card ∧ M = SM.card
⊢ ↑N / ↑M = 2 ^ (k - n)

failed_attempts:
simp [count]; by_cases hi0 : i = 0 <;> simp [hi0]
            · rw [Finset.card_filter]; trans (Finset.Ico 0 (k - n)).card + (Finset.filter (fun j : Fin k => j.val = k - n) Finset.univ).card
              · congr; ext j; simp; by_cases hj : j.val < k - n <;> simp [hj]
              · simp [h.3]
            · rw [Finset.card_filter]; trans (Finset.filter (fun j : Fin k => j.val = (k - n) + i.val) Finset.univ).card
              · congr; ext j; simp; by_cases hj : j.val < k - n <;> simp [hj]
                intro h; rw [h] at hj; exact (lt_add_of_pos_right _ i.zero_le).not_lt hj
              · simp [h.3, hi.2]
          rw [this]; by_cases hi0 : i = 0 <;> simp [hi0, heven.add_one]
        · intro t; simp [s, hi]; rw [Finset.card_eq_zero]; ext j; simp; intro h_eq; exact hi.left.not_le (by simp [h_eq])
    exact Finset.card_pos.mpr ⟨s, hs⟩
  have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h₃; let proj : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin n → Bool) := fun s t i => s t i
    rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_card_fiber proj]; rw [Finset.sum_filter_of_subset (fun s (hs : s ∈ SN) => ?_)]
    · rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl (fun s' hs' => ?_)]
      · rw [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul, mul_comm]
      · have : (SN.filter (fun s => proj s = s')).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
        exact this
    · rw [h₂ s']; rw [h₁ s]; aesop
  rw [hNM]; field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM_pos.ne']; ring

sorry
  rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, hN_card]
  field_simp [hM_pos]
  ring

rcases h₃ with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  have hM : SM.card ≠ 0 := by sorry
  have hNM : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := by sorry
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM]
  norm_cast

sorry
  rw [hNM]
  simp [Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_pow]
  field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM_pos.ne']

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    sorry
  have hM : M ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₃.2]
    sorry
  simp [hNM, hM]
  field_simp

sorry
  rw [hN]
  field_simp [hM]

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  push_cast
  field_simp [hM]

have hM : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₃.2]
    have : ∃ s, s ∈ SM := sorry
    simp [Finset.card_ne_zero_of_mem this]
  have hNM : (N : ℚ) = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    have : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    rw [this, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_two]
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [hM]

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  have hM_q : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by exact_mod_cast Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hM
  field_simp [hM_q]
  ring

let f (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) :=
      fun t i => if i < n then s t i != s t (i + n) else false
    sorry
  rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, hNM]
  have : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; omega
  field_simp [this]

have hM : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := sorry
  have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
  rw [hNM, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_pow, Nat.cast_two]
  field_simp [hM]

rw [hN, hM]
    norm_cast
    sorry
  rw [h_nm_relation]
  field_simp [h_m_nonzero]
  norm_cast

rcases h₃ with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  have hM_pos : SM.card > 0 := sorry
  have hN_eq : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
  rw [hN_eq]
  push_cast
  field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM_pos.ne.symm]
  ring

let f : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) :=
      fun s t i => if h : i < n then (s t i ≠ s t (i + n)) else false
    have hf : ∀ s ∈ SN, f s ∈ SM := sorry
    have h_fiber : ∀ m ∈ SM, (SN.filter (fun s => f s = m)).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    rw [← Finset.card_fiber_constant h_fiber, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_univ, Finset.filter_mem_eq_inter]
    simp [hf, SM]
  rw [this]
  field_simp [hM_pos]
  norm_cast

have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    sorry
  have hM : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [hM]
  norm_cast

rw [Finset.card_congr (λ s _ => f s) (λ w hw => (h₁ _).2 ⟨hφ_switch w, by simp [φ, T_N] at hw; exact hw⟩) (λ s₁ s₂ h1 h2 h => by rw [←hφf s₁ h1, ←hφf s₂ h2, h]) (λ w hw => ⟨φ w, (h₁ _).2 ⟨hφ_switch w, by simp [φ, T_N] at hw; exact hw⟩, hfφ w⟩)]
    rw [Finset.card_congr (λ s _ => f s) (λ w hw => (h₂ _).2 ⟨hφ_switch w, by rw [hT_M_def] at hw; simp [φ, hw.1, hw.2]⟩) (λ s₁ s₂ h1 h2 h => by rw [←hφf s₁ h1, ←hφf s₂ h2, h]) (λ w hw => ⟨φ w, (h₂ _).2 ⟨hφ_switch w, by rw [hT_M_def] at hw; simp [φ, hw.1, hw.2]⟩, hfφ w⟩)]
    exact Finset.card_fiber_eq_of_card_fiber_eq hp h_fiber
  rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, hNM]; have hM : SM.card ≠ 0 := by rw [Finset.card_congr (λ s _ => f s), ←Finset.card_ne_zero]; exact (show T_M.Nonempty from ⟨fun j => ⟨if j = 0 then (k-n) % n else 0, by sorry⟩, by sorry⟩).ne_empty; sorry
  field_simp [hM]; ring

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    norm_cast
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [hM_pos]
  ring

let c : Fin n → ℕ := λ i => if i = 0 then k - n + 1 else 1
      refine ⟨c, ?_, ?_⟩
      · rw [Finset.sum_ite, Finset.filter_eq, Finset.card_singleton, Finset.filter_ne]
        rw [Finset.card_univ, Nat.add_comm, Nat.sub_add_cancel (by omega)]
        simp [Nat.sub_add_cancel (by omega)]
      · intro i; split_ifs with hi <;> [simp [Odd, heven]; simp [Odd]]
    let s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool := λ t i =>
      let flips := (Finset.range t.val).filter (λ j =>
        let step_idx := j
        let lamp_idx := if step_idx < k then (if step_idx < (∑ l : Fin n, c l) then
          let lamp := (Finset.univ.filter (λ l : Fin n => ∑ m : Fin n, if m < l then c m else 0 ≤ step_idx)).card - 1
          (lamp : ℕ) else 0) else 0
        lamp_idx = i.val)
      flips.card % 2 = 1
    have hSM : s ∈ SM := sorry
    exact h₃.2 ▸ Finset.card_pos.mpr ⟨s, hSM⟩
  have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    let f : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) := λ s t i =>
      if i < n then (s t i.val ≠ s t (i.val + n)) else false
    have h_surj : ∀ s_m ∈ SM, (SN.filter (λ s_n => f s_n = s_m)).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, Finset.card_eq_sum_card_fiber f, Finset.sum_congr rfl h_surj, Finset.sum_const, Nat.smul_eq_mul]
    sorry
  simp [h₃, hNM]
  have : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr (ne_of_gt hM_pos)
  field_simp [this]

have hM_pos : M > 0 := by
    sorry
  have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    sorry
  rw [hNM, h₃.1, h₃.2]
  push_cast
  field_simp [Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hM_pos]

rcases h₃ with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  have hM : SM.card ≠ 0 := by sorry
  have hNM : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := by sorry
  rw [hNM, Nat.cast_mul]
  field_simp [Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM]
  norm_cast

obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h₃
  have hM : (SM.card : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by sorry
  have hN : (SN.card : ℚ) = (2 : ℚ) ^ (k - n) * (SM.card : ℚ) := by sorry
  rw [hN]
  field_simp [hM]

have : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    let switches (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) (h : switch_seq s) : Fin k → Fin (2 * n) :=
      fun t => Classical.choose ((h₀ s).mp h).2 t
    let p (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool :=
      fun t i => if (i : ℕ) < n then s t i else false
    have h_pM (s : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) (hs : s ∈ SN) : p s ∈ SM := by
      rw [h₂]; constructor
      · rw [h₀]; constructor
        · ext; simp; rw [((h₀ s).mp (h₁ s).mp hs.1).1]; rfl
        · intro t; obtain ⟨i, hi⟩ := ((h₀ s).mp (h₁ s).mp hs.1).2 t
          use (i : ℕ) % n; ext j; simp [p]
          split_ifs with hjn hjn' hjn''
          · by_cases h_ij : i = j; · simp [hi, h_ij]; · simp [hi, h_ij]
          · exfalso; apply hjn; rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] at h_ij; exact h_ij; exact hjn'
          · rw [Function.update_noteq]; rfl; intro h_eq; apply hjn'
            rw [← h_eq, Fin.is_lt]
          · rfl
      · intro i hi; simp [p, hi.2]; exact ((h₁ s).mp hs).2 i hi
    have h_fiber (sm : Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) (hsm : sm ∈ SM) :
      (SN.filter (fun s => p s = sm)).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := by
      let K (j : Fin n) := (Finset.univ.filter (fun t => switches sm ((h₂ sm).mp hsm).1 t = (j : Fin (2 * n)))).card
      have h_sum_K : ∑ j : Fin n, K j = k := by
        simp only [K, ← Finset.card_sigma, Finset.card_univ]; apply Finset.card_congr (fun (a : Σ j, _) _ => a.2)
        · intro a ha; simp at ha; exact ha.2
        · intro a₁ a₂ ha₁ ha₂ h_eq; simp at ha₁ ha₂; ext; exact h_eq.symm ▸ ha₁.2.symm.trans ha₂.2
        · intro b hb; simp; use ⟨(b : ℕ) % n, b⟩; simp; constructor; · apply Nat.mod_lt; exact n.zero_lt_one.trans_le (by simp)
          · rw [Nat.mod_eq_of_lt]; exact b.is_lt; apply (h₂ sm).mp hsm |>.2 (b : ℕ) % n (by simp); intro t; exact (h₂ sm).mp hsm |>.2 (b : ℕ) % n (by simp) b t
      have h_fiber_card : (SN.filter (fun s => p s = sm)).card = ∏ j : Fin n, 2 ^ (K j - 1) := sorry
      rw [h_fiber_card, ← Nat.pow_sum, h_sum_K]; rfl
    rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, ← Finset.sum_card_fiberwise (fun s _ => h_pM s (by assumption))]
    simp [h_fiber]
  have hM : M ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₃.2]; apply Finset.card_pos.mpr; sorry
  rw [this]; field_simp [hM]; norm_cast

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    let f : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin n → Bool) := fun s t i => fun j => s t j
    rw [← Finset.card_fiberwise_sum SN f]
    have h_f_img : ∀ s ∈ SN, (fun t i => s t i) ∈ SM := sorry
    rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl]
    · intros s' hs'; exact h_fiber s' hs'
    · intros s hs; exact h_f_img s hs
  rw [hN]
  field_simp [hM]
  norm_cast

rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    have : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    exact this
  rw [hratio]
  have hM_nz : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
    norm_cast
    exact Nat.ne_of_gt hpos
  field_simp [hM_nz]
  ring

rcases h₃ with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
    push_cast
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [hM]

obtain ⟨rfl, rfl⟩ := h₃
  have hM : (SM.card : ℚ) ≠ 0 := sorry
  have hSN : SN.card = SM.card * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
  simp [hSN, hM, answer]

let f : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) :=
      fun s t i => if i < n then (s t i != s t (i + n)) else false
    let f_steps : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin k → Fin n) :=
      fun s t => ⟨step s t % n, by let i := step s t; omega⟩
    have h_fiber : ∀ s_m ∈ SM, (Finset.filter (fun s_n => proj s_n = s_m) SN).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    rw [h₃.1, h₃.2]
    have : SN = SM.biUnion (fun s_m => Finset.filter (fun s_n => proj s_n = s_m) SN) := sorry
    rw [this, Finset.card_biUnion]
    · rw [Finset.sum_const]; simp; intro s_m hs_m; exact h_fiber s_m hs_m
    · intro s1 h1 s2 h2 hne; apply Finset.disjoint_filter.mpr; intro s_n h_sn h_proj1 h_proj2; exact hne (h_proj1.symm.trans h_proj2)
  rw [hN_M]; field_simp [hM_pos]; norm_cast

have hM_pos : 0 < M := sorry
  have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
  rw [h₃.1, h₃.2, hNM]
  have hM_qpos : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by norm_cast; exact Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero.mp hM_pos
  field_simp [hM_qpos]
  norm_cast

rcases h₃ with ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
  have hM : (SM.card : ℚ) ≠ 0 := sorry
  have hNM : (SN.card : ℚ) = (SM.card : ℚ) * 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
  rw [hNM, mul_div_cancel_left _ hM]

have hNM : N = M * 2 ^ (k - n) := by
    rcases h₃ with ⟨hN, hM⟩
    rw [hN, hM]
    sorry
  have hM0 : M ≠ 0 := by
    rw [h₃.2]
    sorry
  rw [hNM, Nat.cast_mul, mul_div_cancel_left (M : ℚ) (Nat.cast_ne_zero.mpr hM0)]
  norm_cast

obtain ⟨hN, hM⟩ := h₃
  have hM_pos : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hM]
    have : SM.Nonempty := sorry
    simp [Finset.card_ne_zero_of_mem this.some_spec.1]
  have hNM : (N : ℚ) = (2 ^ (k - n) : ℕ) * (M : ℚ) := by
    rw [hN, hM]
    sorry
  rw [hNM]
  field_simp [hM_pos]
  norm_cast

obtain ⟨hN, hM⟩ := h₃
  have hM_pos : (M : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by
    rw [hM]
    have : SM.Nonempty := sorry
    simp [Finset.card_pos, this]
  field_simp [hM_pos, hN, hM]
  have : SN.card = 2 ^ (k - n) * SM.card := by
    let f : (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) → (Fin (k + 1) → Fin (2 * n) → Bool) :=
      fun s t i => if i < n then s t i ^^^ s t (i + n) else false
    have hf : ∀ s ∈ SN, f s ∈ SM := sorry
    have h_fiber : ∀ s' ∈ SM, (SN.filter (f · = s')).card = 2 ^ (k - n) := sorry
    rw [Finset.card_eq_sum_card_fiber hf]
    simp [h_fiber]
  norm_cast at this
  rw [this]
  ring
